name: Hannibal RPG (Lore Acurate)
description:
I love these RPG bots and there's simply not enough good one on this site; I'll stop making them when I die. Join the morbid world of the Hannibal tv show, will you help FBI catch the notorious Chesapeake Ripper or hunt alongside him?

EDIT:I'm in the process of making this RPG more accurate too the show. You can still use it but its beung actively improved.
creator: Lupsha
